briefdescription.para: Interrupt mask for frame processing done event.
Interrupt mask for ready for next frame event.
Write a value to a register.
Read a value from a register.
Enumeration of test patterns supported by the TPG.

detaileddescription.para: This enumeration defines all the test pattern types that can be generated by the Test Pattern Generator.
This enumeration defines the types of interrupt handlers that can be registered for TPG events.

briefdescription.para: Callback function pointer type for TPG events.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the XV_tpg instance by looking up the device configuration based on the base address and calling the configuration initialization function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_tpg instance to initialize
Base address of the TPG device to initialize

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device configuration is not found
This is the SDT version that uses base address for initialization

briefdescription.para: Look up the device configuration based on the base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the configuration table for the device configuration matching the specified base address.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the TPG device to search for

simplesect.para: Pointer to XV_tpg_Config structure if found, NULL otherwise
This is the SDT version that uses base address for lookup

briefdescription.para: Configure and initialize the TPG core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the TPG instance with the provided configuration and effective base address. It copies the configuration data and sets the ready flag to indicate successful initialization.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_tpg instance to be initialized
Effective base address of the TPG hardware

simplesect.para: This function is only available for non-Linux systems

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the TPG core by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart bit.

simplesect.para: Instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function

briefdescription.para: Check if TPG core processing is done.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the current frame processing is complete.

briefdescription.para: Check if TPG core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the TPG core is in idle state.

briefdescription.para: Check if TPG core is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_START bit to determine if the core is ready to accept new input data.

simplesect.para: 1 if ready for next input, 0 if busy

detaileddescription.para: This function enables auto-restart mode for the TPG core, allowing it to automatically restart after each frame completion.
This function disables auto-restart mode for the TPG core.

briefdescription.para: Set the height of the output frame.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the height of the frame to be generated by the TPG core.
This function retrieves the current height setting of the TPG core.

briefdescription.para: Set the width of the output frame.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the width of the frame to be generated by the TPG core.
This function retrieves the current width setting of the TPG core.
This function sets the background test pattern ID for the TPG core.

briefdescription.para: Get the current background pattern ID.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current background pattern ID setting.

briefdescription.para: Enable motion for color bar pattern.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables motion animation for the color bar background pattern.

simplesect.para: Motion is only applicable when background pattern is set to color bars

briefdescription.para: Get motion enable status for color bar pattern.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current motion enable status for color bars.
This function sets the overlay test pattern ID for the TPG core.

briefdescription.para: Get the current overlay pattern ID.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current overlay pattern ID setting.
This function sets the color mask ID to control which color components are enabled in the output.

briefdescription.para: Get the current color mask ID.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current color mask ID setting.
This function sets the variance of the test pattern between consecutive frames when motion is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Get the current motion speed setting.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current motion speed value.
This function sets the color format for the output video stream.

briefdescription.para: Get the current color format setting.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current color format configuration.
This function sets the horizontal (X) coordinate for the crosshair overlay.
This function retrieves the current horizontal crosshair position.

simplesect.para: Current horizontal crosshair position in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the vertical (Y) coordinate for the crosshair overlay.
This function retrieves the current vertical crosshair position.

simplesect.para: Current vertical crosshair position in pixels

briefdescription.para: Set zone plate horizontal control start value.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the horizontal component starting point based on sinusoidal values for the zone plate test pattern.

briefdescription.para: Get zone plate horizontal control start value.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current horizontal control start value.

briefdescription.para: Set zone plate horizontal control delta value.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the variance (delta) between horizontal components for the zone plate pattern.

briefdescription.para: Get zone plate horizontal control delta value.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current horizontal control delta value.

briefdescription.para: Set zone plate vertical control start value.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the vertical component starting point based on sinusoidal values for the zone plate test pattern.

briefdescription.para: Get zone plate vertical control start value.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current vertical control start value.

briefdescription.para: Set zone plate vertical control delta value.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the variance (delta) between vertical components for the zone plate pattern.

briefdescription.para: Get zone plate vertical control delta value.

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current vertical control delta value.
This function sets the size of the foreground box overlay.
This function retrieves the current box size setting.

simplesect.para: Current box size value in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the Y or R (red/luma) component value for the box overlay.
This function retrieves the Y or R component value of the box.
This function sets the U or G (green/chroma U) component value for the box.
This function retrieves the U or G component value of the box.
This function sets the V or B (blue/chroma V) component value for the box.
This function retrieves the V or B component value of the box.
This function enables the input video stream passthrough mode.
This function retrieves the current input video stream enable status.
This function sets the left (starting X) boundary of the passthrough window.

parameterdescription.para: Left boundary X coordinate in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current left boundary of the passthrough window.
This function sets the upper (starting Y) boundary of the passthrough window.

parameterdescription.para: Upper boundary Y coordinate in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current upper boundary of the passthrough window.
This function sets the right (ending X) boundary of the passthrough window.

parameterdescription.para: Right boundary X coordinate in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current right boundary of the passthrough window.
This function sets the lower (ending Y) boundary of the passthrough window.

parameterdescription.para: Lower boundary Y coordinate in pixels

detaileddescription.para: This function retrieves the current lower boundary of the passthrough window.

briefdescription.para: Sets the dynamic range of DisplayPort color square in RGB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is the dynamic range value to be set.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Gets the dynamic range of DisplayPort color square in RGB.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: The dynamic range value of DisplayPort color square in RGB.
Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the coefficients of DisplayPort color square in YUV.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is the YUV coefficient value to be set.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Gets the coefficients of DisplayPort color square in YUV.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: The YUV coefficient value of DisplayPort color square.
Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables the interlaced video pattern.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is a boolean value to enable (TRUE) or disable (FALSE) interlaced mode.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the field polarity for interlaced video.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is a boolean value to set the field polarity.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Gets the field ID for the current frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Enables the interrupts specified by the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is the interrupt mask value to enable specific interrupts.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Disables the interrupts specified by the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is the interrupt mask value to disable specific interrupts.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Clears the interrupts specified by the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.
is the interrupt mask value to clear specific interrupts.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: The current interrupt enable status mask.
Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_tpg instance.

simplesect.para: Asserts if the pointer is NULL or instance is not ready.

briefdescription.para: Install an asynchronous callback function for interrupt handling.

detaileddescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted:
HandlerType Callback Function Type
(XVTPG_HANDLER_DONE) DoneCallback (XVTPG_HANDLER_READY) ReadyCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the tpg IP instance.
is the type of handler to be installed (DONE or READY).
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the TPG core driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler clears the pending interrupt and determined if the source is frame done signal. If yes, starts the next frame processing and calls the registered callback function

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XVTpg_SetCallback() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance that just interrupted.
